name: EGB OE TL.Z./MUENCH RUECK
summary: Munich Re is a reinsurance company headquartered in Munich, Germany, providing insurance coverage to other insurance companies. The company operates globally, offering a wide range of reinsurance products and services, including property-casualty, life and health, and specialty lines. Munich Re is one of the world's leading reinsurers, known for its risk expertise and financial strength.
